Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-09-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR 6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Paul K. Pfeilschiefter, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Vadym Kvyetko, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants.
Defaults were entered against defendants Damien Quinn, American Opportunity Partners, LLC, 1102 Taraval, LLC, 3066 Market Street, LLC & 647 Duncan Street, LLC on March 5, 2015.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, March 9, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Vadym Kvyetko, and against the Defaulted Defendants Damien Quinn, American Opportunity Partners, LLC, 1102 Taraval, LLC, 3066 Market Street, LLC & 647 Duncan Street, LLC, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $2,655,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,545,178.03, for a total judgment in the amount of $4,200,178.03.

The Court instructed Mr. Pfeilschiefter to prepare the proposed Judgment with an attachment which enumerates the date each contract was signed and the amount therein, including pre-judgment interest.
